title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Bedford-Stuyvesant, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for brownstones and historic buildings. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Bed-Stuy's beautiful brownstones and historic row houses provide ideal roosting spots for bats in attics, chimneys, and wall voids. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in humane bat removal and exclusion services throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant, protecting your home while ensuring these protected species are safely relocated. Our expert technicians understand the unique architecture of Bed-Stuy buildings and provide comprehensive solutions tailored to your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bedford-Stuyvesant for years, with deep expertise in the historic brownstones and multi-family buildings that define this neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use humane, legal bat exclusion methods and provide warranties on all our work, ensuring your Bed-Stuy home remains bat-free.
localContext: From the landmark Restoration Plaza to the tree-lined streets near Herbert Von King Park, Bed-Stuy's century-old brownstones often have gaps in soffits, loose roof shingles, and unused chimneys that attract bats. The neighborhood's dense residential architecture requires specialized exclusion techniques that preserve the historic character while effectively preventing bat re-entry.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Bedford-Stuyvesant typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the colony size, number of entry points, and the complexity of your building's architecture. Brownstones and multi-story buildings may require additional work. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bats are protected species in New York, so removal must be done humanely and legally. Best Pest Control NYC follows all state and local regulations, using exclusion methods that allow bats to leave but not return. We never harm bats and time our services to avoid maternity seasons when flightless young are present.

faqs.question: How do bats get into Bed-Stuy brownstones?
faqs.answer: Bats can squeeze through openings as small as 3/8 of an inch. In Bed-Stuy's historic buildings, common entry points include gaps around chimneys, deteriorated soffits and fascia boards, loose roof shingles, attic vents, and spaces where additions meet original structures. Our thorough inspection identifies all potential entry points for complete exclusion.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Bedford-Stuyvesant?
faqs.answer: The exclusion process typically takes 3-7 days after installation of one-way exit devices, allowing all bats to leave naturally. Complete sealing and cleanup may take 1-2 weeks total depending on your building's size and the extent of the infestation. We then provide follow-up inspections to ensure your Bed-Stuy home remains bat-free.
